name: Salmon and Tomato Pasta
recipeIngredient: 175 g Pasta shapes of your choice
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F) or Gas mark 5.
2. Drain the canned salmon and set aside the juice.
3. Flake the salmon and reserve for later use.
4. Cook the pasta in salted water for 5 minutes until al dente, then drain.
5. Place the cooked pasta in an individual or large oven-safe serving dish.
6. Mix the reserved salmon juice with chopped tomatoes, basil, and black pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle flaked salmon over the pasta.
8. Spread the tomato mixture evenly over the top of the pasta.
9. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the surface.
10. Cover with lids or aluminum foil.
11. Bake at 190°C (375°F) for 15 minutes, then remove the lid and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
12. Serve hot with salad.
Serves 4. Approximately 325 calories per serving.
